description: Structured snapshot of active sorry obligations. Used by agents to quickly identify the current proof target and dependencies without re-reading lengthy planning markdown.
maintenance: Update when adding/removing sorrys or when dependency structure changes. Progress milestones belong to sorry-cards/{symbol}.md (milestone table). Detailed history: git log.
updated: 2026-04-23 (第59報: sorry 0 化 / ブランチマージ準備完了。第58報で 3 戦略すべての基盤崩壊を確認した後、偽証明を積み上げないため `placeLDGroups_landing_groundingEdge_mono` を一時 axiom 化。削除した補題: `landingDistance_foldl_placeFU_preserve_on_remaining` (refuted), `placeLDGroups_remaining_head_pin_landing_empty` (h_sorted 依存), `placeLDGroups_landing_groundingEdge_mono_aux` (IH 不健全)。保持: `_step_generic` / `_step` (いずれも 0-sorry、Greenfield Rewrite 再利用見込)。lake build green, sorry 0, warnings 0。次ステップは Greenfield Rewrite 計画 docs/plans/gravity-greenfield-rewrite-plan.md に基づく Gravity 層の全面再構築。)
